title: Zelda: Hyrule Terrors
description: Zelda-inspired Armor, Weapons, Mobs, and iconic gear from BOTW and TOTK!
body:
# ![modlogo](https://i.imgur.com/5wadonc.png)

Step into a Zelda-inspired world where danger lurks in every biome and the spoils of battle bring legendary power. _Hyrule Terrors_ brings iconic enemies, weapons, and armor from **Breath of the Wild** and **Tears of the Kingdom** into the world of Minecraft, breathing new life into your adventures.

***

### Hyrule Terror's

Summon or encounter four iconic creatures, each with their own behaviors, spawn rules, and custom attributes:

*   **Bokoblin** – Mischievous, chaotic creatures that spawn in large groups.

![alt text](https://i.imgur.com/wjTopqh.png)

*   **Lizalfos** – Agile lizard warriors with poisonous traits.

![alt text](https://i.imgur.com/Xiu2etK.png)

*   **Chuchu** – Bouncy blobs that spawn in packs.

![alt text](https://i.imgur.com/uUNTeFs.png)

*   **Keese** – Flying nuisances with an eerie BIG eye!

![alt text](https://i.imgur.com/QAD1uRC.png) ![alt text](https://i.imgur.com/FUcIzLv.png)

### Weapons & Mob Drop Loot

Vanquish foes and earn custom items and rare monster parts:

*   **Bokoblin Fang** & **Horn**
*   **Lizalfos Horn**, **Tail**, and **Talon**
*   **Chuchu Jelly**

Legendary weapons include:

*   **Lizalfos Horn Dagger** – Quick and deadly.
    
*   **Bokoblin Arm** – Creepy still alive arm from a Bokoblin! ![alt text](https://i.imgur.com/Uf5Rxx9.gif)
    
*   **Silver Longsword**, **Knight's Claymore**, and the **Boulder Breaker** – Each with unique damage and swing speed.
    

## Armor Sets

Equip yourself for war with handcrafted armor inspired by Zelda:

*   **Zora Armor** – Sleek aquatic gear.

![alt text](https://i.imgur.com/p1P5WCO.png)

*   **Barbarian Armor** – Unleash your wild side.

![alt text](https://i.imgur.com/kBYUsZa.png)

*   **Knight Armor** – A strong defense against dark forces.

![alt text](https://i.imgur.com/fOV13jD.png)

*   **Evil Spirit Armor** – For those who walk the shadowy path.

![alt text](https://i.imgur.com/0tuMiWU.png)

***

## Structures! All Bokoblin Forts and Hideouts!

![alt text](https://i.imgur.com/yYsxbo0.png)![alt text](https://i.imgur.com/KbVsW7R.png)![alt text](https://i.imgur.com/k06IxPc.png)

***

***

## Possible Future Plans - Depending on popularity!

*   Possibly more! unique Zelda gear…
*   More structures??
*   Boss mobs? and mini-bosses??

***

## Required:

## \- Built with **Architectury API** ![alt text](https://media.forgecdn.net/avatars/thumbnails/313/420/64/64/637408811378175814.png)

## \- AzureLib and Cloth Config

![alt text](https://media.forgecdn.net/avatars/thumbnails/282/467/64/64/637289313020452406.png) ![alt text](https://www.bisecthosting.com/images/CF/AzureLib/BH_AL_header.png)

***

## Join the Adventure

Whether you’re a seasoned adventurer or just starting your journey, _Hyrule Terrors_ brings the thrill of Zelda into the blocky world of Minecraft.

Dare to face the terrors of Hyrule?

***

> This mod is a fan-made project and is not affiliated with Nintendo or the official Legend of Zelda series.

[**![Promotional banner](https://www.bisecthosting.com/images/CF/PixelDreamStudios/SPEC_PixelDreamStudios_Promo.webp)**](https://www.bisecthosting.com/PixelDream)
